response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analysis: Two distinct song performances were identified, separated by a brief interlude. 2. Song 1 ('Baka Majime') was identified from the video text credits at the start and the performance by Inugami Korone and Oozora Subaru. The original artists (Creepy Nuts, Ayase, Ikura) were identified via web search to resolve lyrics. 3. Interlude from 04:47-04:53 was identified. 4. Song 2 ('Longiness') was identified from text on screen at 04:53. Web search confirmed the performer and original artist (SugLawd Familiar). 5. Full lyrics for both songs were retrieved via search and formatted into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Inugami Korone and Oozora Subaru singing the song "Baka Majime" followed by an instrumental transition, and then Inugami Korone singing "Longiness".

scenes.description: Inugami Korone and Oozora Subaru perform the song "Baka Majime" on a neon-lit stage with multiple screens.

scenes.description: An instrumental interlude with stage lights shifting and the performer preparing for the next song.
Inugami Korone performs the song "Longiness" on stage.
